# BP-84 negative: floating-point conversion happens before division
lang: go
file: BP-84-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

func completionPercent(completed, total int) float64 {
	percent := float64(completed) / float64(total) * 100
	return percent
}

func completedRatio(completed, total int) int {
	ratio := completed / total
	return ratio
}

func scale(value int) int {
	return value * 100
}
